title: Lekcija 76

answers.answer: What happen would if the system crashed?
answers.feedback: Ispravan redosled reči je What would happen....

answers.answer: Would what happen if the system crashed?
answers.feedback: U pitanju, would dolazi nakon what, a ne pre njega.

answers.answer: What would happens if the system crashed?
answers.feedback: Uz would ide glagol u osnovnom obliku, zato happens treba da bude happen.

answers.answer: What would happen if the system crashed?

instructions: Ovaj zadatak nema zvuk. Pročitajte pitanje ispod i izaberite tačan odgovor.
explanation:
Ako wh- pitanje (when, who, why, how) koristi modalni glagol, modalni glagol dolazi ispred subjekta. Glavni glagol ostaje u osnovnom obliku. Na primer:

  • What can you do to fix this? - Kuuliza kuhusu uwezekano.

  • Why should we start early? — Traženje saveta.

  • How must we prepare? - Kuuliza kuhusu mahitaji.

  • When will you finish? - Kuuliza kuhusu matendo ya baadaye.

  • Where could I find help? - Pitajte o opcijama.

Na ovaj način, pitaš o onome što je moguće, potrebno ili očekivano.
